chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-150 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 490/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 26-08-2025 Mr. Anwar Ali Lohar, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG a/w SIP/I.O Meharban, P.S, A-section, Ghotki. **** At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition and submits that for the redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will avail efficacious and alternate remedy before the competent Court of law. Accordingly, the petition along with listed application stands dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to exhaust his alternate remedy before the competent forum/Court of law, if so advised. JUDGE Ahmad
